description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ubuntu:19.10 Docker image and set GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to recursive. Define a before_script that adds i386 architecture, installs zip unzip wget libglib2.0-0, exports LOVE_VERSION="11.2", GAME_NAME="ATaleAboutTail", GAME_PROVIDER="tailtail-ld40", ICON_FILE="icon.png", HERE=$(pwd), SOURCE_DIR="$HERE/src", BUILD_DIR="$HERE/build", TEMP_DIR="$HERE/build/.temp", CACHE_DIR="$HERE/build/.cache", LOVE_FILE="$TEMP_DIR/archived.love", and runs /bin/bash .buildscript/preparations.sh. Add a build:linux job that runs dpkg --add-architecture i386, apt-get install -y -qq gcc-multilib:i386, then executes /bin/bash .buildscript/linux.sh, and publishes all files under build/linux/* as artifacts. Add a build:macos job that runs /bin/bash .buildscript/osx.sh and stores build/macos/ATaleAboutTail_osx.zip as an artifact. Add a build:windows job that runs /bin/bash .buildscript/windows.sh and stores build/win32/ATaleAboutTail_win.zip as an artifact.
